title: Lazy Sunday Smokey Oli Potluck Casserole
description: A delicious gluten-free dutch dish featuring sour and tender flavors with a touch of smokiness, perfect for lazy Sundays.

ingredients.name: Sour Vegetables (e.g., Pickles or Canned Tomatoes)
Meat (optional; for meat lovers) - Chicken Breast or Turkey

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a large baking dish.
In a saucepan, mix flour with butter until crumbly. Add milk slowly to create a smooth gravy.
In another bowl, combine sour cream, olive oil, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Add vegetable mixture (sour vegetables and optionally diced meat) into the prepared baking dish.
Pour the gravy over the top of the vegetables and evenly distribute it, making sure to cover all ingredients.
Sprinkle additional flour on top for a gluten-free crust if desired. Ensure even cooking.
Bake for about 40-50 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly. Let rest before serving with friends!
Serve hot as a main course or side dish depending on your meal plan.
